allow:
Bash(curl -sI "https://commtrans-gtfs.azurewebsites.net/api/Download" 2>&1 | grep -i "http/\\|content-type\\|location"
curl -sI "https://commtrans-gtfs.azurewebsites.net/api/gtfsfeed" 2>&1 | grep -i "http/\\|content-type\\|location"
curl -sI "https://commtrans-gtfs.azurewebsites.net/api/zip" 2>&1 | grep -i "http/\\|content-type\\|location")

Bash(node -e "const d = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('public/pulse-data.json','utf8'\)\); const s = d.systems?.find\(s => s.id?.includes\('swift'\) || s.title?.includes\('Swift'\) || s.kicker?.includes\('Swift'\)\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(s?.lines?.map\(l => \({id:l.id, name:l.name}\)\), null, 2\)\)")
